title: Halo-Halo Filipino Dessert with Ikura Topping
description: A Filipino-inspired dessert featuring shaved ice, sweetened beans, fruits, and a topping of ikura for a luxurious twist. This refreshing treat is perfect for hot summer days.
instructions: Combine ube halaya, kamote halaya, and leche flan in a large bowl.
Add shaved ice to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add sweetened beans and mix until evenly distributed.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving cups or glasses.
Top each serving with a piece of ikura.
Garnish with chopped sesame seeds and a drizzle of coconut milk.
